transport.title: Getting there & parking
transport.car: By car: free on-site parking (100 spaces).
transport.transit: By public transit: RER A to Vincennes, then taxi (10 min).

announcement.heading: We're getting married!
announcement.body: With joy and love, we invite you to share this unforgettable moment with us.

story.heading: Our story
story.body: From a chance encounter to a lifetime together — every chapter has been written with love. We cannot wait to share the next one with you.

celebration.heading: The celebration
celebration.body: An evening of dinner, dancing, and joy awaits. We have planned every detail so you can simply be present with us.

closing.heading: See you soon
closing.body: We cannot wait to celebrate with you.
